notes: Created SECURITY DEFINER RPC offmarket_persist_optometry_row patterned on fire RPC; differences: vertical='optometry', naics default '621320', raw_enrichment maps optometry-specific fields (practice_type, vision_source_member, optical_attached, recent_acquisition, enrichment_notes).

Initial run had 1 failure (row 45, Mansfield Vision Center LLC) due to malformed entity_formation_date='2003-07'. Added safe_date() helper to coerce partial YYYY-MM and YYYY values to full ISO dates. Re-ran (idempotent upserts) — all 79 succeeded.
Dropped 20 'neutral' direction signals (DB CHECK constraint blocks them).
